raw_consumer_statement: Ordered an item from XXXX, they shipped the item without any means of signature confirmation. There was only a XXXX tracking number with a close-up photo. The biggest issue is that I didnt receive the item. I reached out to XXXX who insisted that the shipping and delivery confirmation method without a signature requirement is consistent with policy. Amex has insisted that is consistent with their network policy. How is this exactly fair to a consumer who purchases an item but never receives it? I have attempted two times to reopen the case with Amex who have stopped the charge back process and ruled in favor of XXXX.
